## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets committed (`.env`, keys, tokens, tfstate). Placeholders only.
- [ ] Identifiers redacted in docs/examples (`example.com`, `youruser`, `homelab-*`).
- [ ] `./scripts/verify.sh` and `make validate` pass locally.
- [ ] Docs under `docs/` updated if behavior changed.
- [ ] New stack follows the `_template/` pattern (if applicable).
